Bus Timings

E102 Bus Timings Ibn Battuta to Mussafah

May 25, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, UAE adventurers! These two cities are the stars of the UAE show, and now it’s easier than ever to see both. Enter the E102 bus - your new bestie for city-hopping. This cool ride links Dubai’s Ibn Battuta with Abu Dhabi’s Mussafah. No more traffic headaches or pricey taxis! Whether you’re a local on the move or a tourist trying to max out your trip, this bus has got you covered. Curious about how to catch this cross-city express? Let’s dive into the details and get you on board!

Contents

E102 Bus Timings and Fare

The E102 bus operates from early morning till late at night, ensuring that commuters have ample opportunities to embark on their journey. With timings starting from 6:20 and running until 23:20, passengers can conveniently plan their travel according to their schedule.

From Ibn Battuta Bus Station From Musaffah
13:49 12:30
14:49 13:30
15:49 14:30
16:49 15:30
17:49 16:30
18:49 17:30
19:49 18:30
20:49 19:30
21:49 20:30
22:49 21:30
23:49 22:30
00:44 23:25
01:39 00:20

Download PDF Bus E102

For the complete timings, you can check at the official website of RTA, or you can visit this link E102 Bus Timings And for the timetable from Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Abu Dhabi, you can check the timetable below

How about the fare? At a fare of AED 25, the E102 bus offers an affordable and economical travel option for passengers.

Dubai, a global metropolis known for its towering skyscrapers, luxurious malls, and dynamic lifestyle, serves as a hub of business, tourism, and innovation. Ibn Battuta, situated within this dynamic city, is home to the iconic Ibn Battuta Mall and serves as a strategic transportation node.

On the other hand, Mussafah, located in Abu Dhabi, is an industrial district that plays a crucial role in the emirate’s economy. With its sprawling industrial complexes and residential communities, Mussafah is a key destination for commuters traveling to and from Abu Dhabi.

Departing from Ibn Battuta Bus Station in Dubai, the bus embarks on its journey towards Mussafah in Abu Dhabi. Here are the stops of E102 Bus Route1. Al Jafiliya Bus Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Ibn Battuta Bus Station

  2. Abu Dhabi Airport Terminal 1 and 3

  3. Mussafah, Al Ain University S&T

  4. Mussafah, Al Najah PrivateSchool

  5. Mussafah, Al Mussafah Park

  6. Mussafah Shabiya Bus Station

Embarking on the E102 bus promises passengers a comfortable and hassle-free journey. The route from Ibn Battuta to Mussafah spans approximately an hour and forty minutes to two hours, providing travelers with ample time to relax, unwind, or catch up on work during the commute.## Conclusion

The E102 intercity bus stands as a testament to the UAE’s commitment to enhancing connectivity and accessibility across its cities.

By facilitating seamless travel between Dubai Ibn Battuta and Mussafah, this service not only simplifies commutes but also fosters economic and social integration between these vibrant emirates.

With its convenient e102 bus timings, comfortable journey experience, and affordable pricing, the bus emerges as a preferred choice for travelers seeking a reliable mode of intercity transportation in the UAE.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 25, 2025.
